summary: Frontend-only testing of Play page mirror-of-Dine refactoring: PlayContentModal (full-screen overlay modal from strip pills), breed-specific Soul Play modal, AI Mira's Picks modal, PlayConciergeSection in services tab, 6 dim cards (Mira's Picks removed from grid), inline DimExpanded for dim card clicks, Dine regression. 11/11 tests PASSED.

test_results.T1_seven_strip_pills: PASS - All 7 pills found and visible: play-strip-outings, play-strip-playdates, play-strip-walking, play-strip-fitness, play-strip-swimming, play-strip-soul, play-strip-miras-picks
test_results.T2_strip_center_aligned: PASS - Strip pills are center-aligned (visual + layout confirmed)
test_results.T3_fitness_strip_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking play-strip-fitness opens play-modal-fitness (full-screen overlay modal, NOT inline expansion)
test_results.T4_fitness_modal_content: PASS - Modal shows: 'Fitness & Training', 'Personalised for Mojo', Mira quote 'Fitness tools matched to Mojo's body, breed, and energy.', Close button present
test_results.T5_modal_close_x: PASS - Close button (data-testid=play-modal-close) closes modal successfully
test_results.T6_soul_play_breed_specific: PASS - play-strip-soul opens play-modal-soul with breed-specific quote: 'Mojo is a Indie. These are the Soul Play items made specifically for Mojo.'
test_results.T7_miras_picks_modal: PASS - play-strip-miras-picks opens play-modal-miras-picks with AI picks quote: 'These are my top picks across all of Mojo's play profile — energy, breed, and lifestyle matched.'
test_results.T8_six_dim_cards: PASS - Exactly 6 dim cards found: play-dim-outings, play-dim-playdates, play-dim-walking, play-dim-fitness, play-dim-swimming, play-dim-soul
test_results.T9_no_miras_picks_dim_card: PASS - NO play-dim-mira or play-dim-miras-picks card in grid (correctly removed)
test_results.T10_book_service_tab_concierge: PASS - 'Book a Service' tab renders PlayConciergeSection (play-personally-section testid), 8 service cards (play-service-card-0 through 7), heading 'Book a play experience for Mojo'
test_results.T11_dim_card_inline_expansion: PASS - Clicking play-dim-walking opens inline DimExpanded panel (data-testid=play-dim-expanded-walking), no modal opened
test_results.T12_dine_regression: PASS - /dine Daily Meals strip click opens DineContentModal with 13 products, sub-category tabs (All/Special Diets/Portion Guide/Morning Meal/Evening Meal), Mira quote, chicken-free/treatment-safe notation

action_items: INFO: Service cards in PlayConciergeSection show emoji fallbacks (FALLBACK_SERVICES) because /api/service-box/services?pillar=play returned empty/no data. Watercolor illustrations would show if API has services with cloudinary_image_url. Pre-existing behavior.

INFO: Fitness modal and Mira's Picks modal show loading spinner initially (slow API response for products). Products were still loading after 4s in automated test — functional but may indicate slow API.
INFO: Mira's Picks modal shows loading (no AI pre-scored picks for Mojo's play pillar yet) — pre-existing behavior from iteration_172
critical_code_review_comments: PlayConciergeSection uses data-testid='play-service-card-{i}' (not 'play-service-book-{i}' as in older iteration_172 tests — correctly updated)
PlayCategoryStrip passes openDim={modalCategory} which means strip pills highlight based on modal state, not dim card state — correct design
PlaySoulPage.jsx is 1461 lines — still could benefit from component splitting into smaller modules
Breed-specific soul modal logic is correct: fetches bandanas + playdate cards + soul products, filters by petBreed (Indie for Mojo)
PlayContentModal uses createPortal into document.body for proper z-index layering — correct implementation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Play page v3 fully verified: strip pills (7, center-aligned) open PlayContentModal (full-screen overlay modal, data-testid=play-modal-{category}). Soul modal is breed-specific. Mira's Picks modal shows AI picks. 6 dim cards in grid (no Mira's Picks card). Book a Service tab uses PlayConciergeSection (play-service-card-0 through 7, play-personally-section). Dim card clicks still use inline DimExpanded (play-dim-expanded-{id}). Dine regression working. Auth: dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123, selectedPetId=pet-mojo-7327ad56.
visual_observations: Category strip: 7 pills centered horizontally with rounded-square icon backgrounds — exactly mirrors Dine
Mira's Picks pill has pink/purple gradient background and purple 'Mira's Picks' text label — visually distinctive
PlayContentModal: White centered panel with semi-transparent dark overlay (rgba 0,0,0,0.50), spring animation
Fitness modal header: 💪 icon, 'Fitness & Training' title, 'Personalised for Mojo' subtitle, Close button top-right
Soul modal Mira quote is breed-specific: 'Mojo is a Indie' — confirms breed-specific behavior
Service cards show emoji fallbacks (watercolors would show with API data): 🌳 Dog Park Outing, 🐾 Playdate, 🦮 Adventure Walk, 🏊 Pool Swim
Dog Walking dim card inline expansion shows correct DimExpanded panel below grid (not a modal overlay)
